testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor addToken should add Authorization header to request

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor addToken should preserve existing headers when adding Authorization

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor addToken should clone the request without modifying original
testcase.name: AuthInterceptor addToken should clone the request without modifying original

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor intercept should add token to request headers
testcase.name: AuthInterceptor intercept should add token to request headers

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor intercept should pass through successful requests
testcase.name: AuthInterceptor intercept should pass through successful requests

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor intercept should handle 401 error by calling handle401Error
testcase.name: AuthInterceptor intercept should handle 401 error by calling handle401Error

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor intercept should handle 403 error by showing snackbar and navigating back
testcase.name: AuthInterceptor intercept should handle 403 error by showing snackbar and navigating back

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor intercept should rethrow non-401/403 errors
testcase.name: AuthInterceptor intercept should rethrow non-401/403 errors

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor intercept should handle request without token
testcase.name: AuthInterceptor intercept should handle request without token

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor handle401Error should refresh token when not already refreshing
testcase.name: AuthInterceptor handle401Error should refresh token when not already refreshing

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor handle401Error should use refresh token from localStorage when store returns null
testcase.name: AuthInterceptor handle401Error should use refresh token from localStorage when store returns null

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor handle401Error should return error when no refresh token is available
testcase.name: AuthInterceptor handle401Error should return error when no refresh token is available

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor handle401Error should logout user when refresh token fails
testcase.name: AuthInterceptor handle401Error should logout user when refresh token fails

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor handle401Error should queue requests when already refreshing
testcase.name: AuthInterceptor handle401Error should queue requests when already refreshing

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor handle401Error should set isRefreshingToken flag correctly
testcase.name: AuthInterceptor handle401Error should set isRefreshingToken flag correctly

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor handle401Error should reset tokenSubject when starting refresh
testcase.name: AuthInterceptor handle401Error should reset tokenSubject when starting refresh

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor logoutUser should navigate to login with returnUrl query param
testcase.name: AuthInterceptor logoutUser should navigate to login with returnUrl query param

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor integration scenarios should handle multiple concurrent 401 errors correctly
testcase.name: AuthInterceptor integration scenarios should handle multiple concurrent 401 errors correctly

testcase.classname: AuthInterceptor integration scenarios should handle token refresh failure for queued requests

testsuite.name: AuthService - Static Functions and Business Logic

testcase.name: AuthService - Static Functions and Business Logic Static Utility Functions for Complex Logic Authentication Logic should correctly determine ownership
